_comment: Editable source for the threat-hunting demo. Run gen_embeddings.py to (re)generate ../data.cql and ../queries.cql with real nomic-embed-text-v2-moe embeddings. Three behaviour clusters (phishing, ransomware/C2, exfiltration) make ANN meaningful; actor names have phonetic variants; infrastructure edges form a graph; activity_counts make indicators 4 and 8 spike.

indicators.description: Phishing page mimicking the Microsoft 365 sign-in to harvest corporate credentials from employees.
Credential harvesting site spoofing a PayPal account verification flow to steal logins and card data.
Server hosting cloned online banking login portals used for credential theft and session hijacking.
Command and control beacon domain for a ransomware affiliate, polling for encryption tasking over HTTPS.
Command and control server issuing file-encryption commands to ransomware implants on victim hosts.
Ransomware loader that encrypts user files and drops a ransom note demanding cryptocurrency payment.
Exfiltration endpoint receiving stolen documents and databases from compromised networks over TLS.
Infostealer that collects saved browser passwords and cookies and uploads them to a remote drop server.
Fake software update page delivering a credential stealer disguised as a browser plugin installer.
Staging server aggregating exfiltrated archives before transfer to actor-controlled storage.

queries.name: ann_phishing
queries.text: fake bank login page that steals usernames and passwords

queries.name: ann_c2
queries.text: command and control beacon for ransomware encryption tasking
